signInChooser.title.description: Title of the sign-in chooser dialog shown when a signed-out user clicks Sign In; offers wallet vs email.

signInChooser.description.description: Body of the sign-in chooser dialog: invites the user to pick a sign-in method.

signInChooser.loginButton.description: Button in the sign-in chooser that opens Privy login for email and the other social/messenger methods.

signInChooser.tos.description: Terms-of-Service consent line under the sign-in chooser actions. Contains a <link>...</link> tag wrapping the linked Terms of Service text.

signInChooser.connecting.description: Busy label on the Connect wallet option while the wallet connection is in progress. Includes a trailing ellipsis.

signInChooser.errorTitle.description: Error toast title shown when wallet sign in fails in the sign-in chooser.

signInChooser.errorDescription.description: Default error toast description when wallet sign in fails, used when no specific error message is available.

authRequired.title.description: Title of the auth-required prompt shown when a signed-out user tries a gated action; means 'Sign in required'.

authRequired.description.description: Body of the auth-required prompt asking the user to sign in to continue.

authRequired.communityDescription.description: Longer body of the auth-required prompt: asks the user to sign in and join the community to discover and vote for domains.

walletConnectionDialog.walletAndNetworkR.description: Success message in the wallet-connection dialog confirming both the wallet and network are ready.

walletConnectionDialog.preparing.description: Loading message shown while the wallet-connection dialog prepares. Includes a trailing ellipsis.

walletConnectionDialog.connectWallet.description: Button to connect a wallet in the wallet-connection dialog.

walletConnectionDialog.useThisWallet.description: Button to set an already-connected wallet as the active one.

walletConnectionDialog.switchWallet.description: Button to switch to the required wallet when a different one is connected.

walletConnectionDialog.switchNetwork.description: Button to switch the wallet to the required blockchain network.

walletConnectionDialog.connecting.description: Busy label on the connect button while connecting. Includes a trailing ellipsis.

walletConnectionDialog.activating.description: Busy label while the chosen wallet is being set as active. Includes a trailing ellipsis.

walletConnectionDialog.switchingNetwork.description: Busy label while the wallet network is being switched. Includes a trailing ellipsis.

walletConnectionDialog.walletStep.description: Step-indicator label for the wallet step of the wallet-connection flow.

walletConnectionDialog.networkStep.description: Step-indicator label for the network step of the wallet-connection flow.

walletConnectionDialog.requiredWallet.description: Label for the wallet address the user must connect (the required wallet).

walletConnectionDialog.differentWalletCo.description: Warning noting the user connected a wallet other than the required one.

walletConnectionDialog.youConnected.description: Label preceding the wallet address the user actually connected.

walletConnectionDialog.butWeNeed.description: Label preceding the wallet address the app actually requires (contrast with what the user connected).

walletConnectionDialog.switchNetworkProm.description: Warning asking the user to switch their wallet network to continue.

walletConnectionDialog.current.description: Label for the user's current blockchain network in the network panel.

walletConnectionDialog.required.description: Label for the required blockchain network in the network panel.

walletConnectionDialog.chainLabel.description: Label showing a blockchain chain by its numeric id. {id} is the EVM chain id (e.g. 1) — keep the placeholder.

domainSearchCombobox.placeholder.description: Placeholder in the domain search/select combobox; means 'Select or enter a domain'.

domainSearchCombobox.loadingDomains.description: Loading text shown in the domain combobox while domain options load.

domainSearchCombobox.useTypedDomain.description: Section heading in the domain combobox above the option that uses the user's typed-in domain.

domainSearchCombobox.domains.description: Section heading in the domain combobox above the list of suggested domains.

viewSelector.label.description: Accessible label for a compact view-mode selector.

viewSelector.grid.description: Tooltip and accessible label for the card-grid view option.

viewSelector.list.description: Tooltip and accessible label for the compact-row list view option.

previewGate.title.description: Title of the preview-access gate shown on preview/staging environments; means 'Preview access'.

previewGate.description.description: Body of the preview-access gate prompting the user to enter the access code.

previewGate.accessCode.description: Label for the access-code input on the preview-access gate.

previewGate.unlock.description: Button that submits the access code to unlock the preview environment.

missingEmail.noContactEmail.description: Title/label of the warning shown when the user has no contact email on file; means 'No Contact Email'.

missingEmail.later.description: Dismiss button on the missing-email warning, deferring the action.

missingEmail.addEmailToProfile.description: Primary button on the missing-email dialog that navigates to the profile to add an email.

missingEmail.addEmail.description: Primary button on the missing-email popover that navigates to add an email.

announcements.previous.description: Accessibility (aria) label for the button that shows the previous announcement.

announcements.next.description: Accessibility (aria) label for the button that shows the next announcement.

announcements.dismiss.description: Accessibility (aria) label for the button that dismisses an announcement.

emailRequired.title.description: Title of the email-required dialog; means 'Email Required'.

emailRequired.description.description: Body of the email-required dialog asking the user to add a valid email to continue.

voteOrShare.signInToVote.description: Primary button to sign in so the user can vote for a domain.

voteOrShare.shareDomainInstead.description: Secondary button to share a domain instead of signing in to vote.

datePicker.naturalLanguagePlaceholder.description: Placeholder in the natural-language date input giving example phrasings; e.g. 'Tomorrow or next week'.

datePicker.selectDate.description: Accessibility (sr-only) label for the calendar button that opens the date picker; means 'Select date'.

selectWalletAndChain.linked.description: Badge marking a wallet as linked to the user's account.

selectWalletAndChain.selectChainPlacehol.description: Placeholder in the chain selector before a network is chosen; means 'Select a Chain'.

feedback.close.description: Accessibility (aria) label for the button that closes the feedback toast.

feedback.skip.description: Button that skips/dismisses the feedback prompt without submitting.

nftWalletCard.copyResolvedAddress.description: Accessibility (sr-only) label for the button that copies the resolved wallet address.

nftWalletCard.title.description: Card title for the receiving-wallet input that accepts a wallet address or ENS name. Keep 'ENS' untranslated.

creditCard.cardHolder.description: Field label on the credit-card visual for the cardholder's name; means 'Card Holder'.

creditCard.expires.description: Field label on the credit-card visual for the expiration date; means 'Expires'.

walletCard.ethereumWallet.description: Footer label on the wallet card indicating an Ethereum wallet. Keep 'Ethereum' (network name) recognizable.

walletCard.connected.description: Status label on the wallet card indicating the wallet is connected.

walletCard.connectedNetworks.description: Title of the dialog listing the networks a wallet is connected to.

requestWalletConnection.defaultActionDes.description: Default value substituted into the {actionDescription} placeholder of the 'connect' description, e.g. 'to complete this action'. A short purpose clause.

requestWalletConnection.title.wrongWalle.description: Wallet-connection dialog title when the connected wallet is not the required one.

requestWalletConnection.title.settingAct.description: Wallet-connection dialog title shown while the app sets the chosen wallet as active.

requestWalletConnection.title.connect.description: Wallet-connection dialog title prompting the user to connect their wallet.

requestWalletConnection.description.wron.description: Wallet-connection dialog body when the wrong wallet is connected, asking the user to connect the correct one.

requestWalletConnection.description.sett.description: Wallet-connection dialog body shown while the active wallet is being set; asks the user to wait.

requestWalletConnection.description.conn.description: Wallet-connection dialog body prompting connection. {actionDescription} is a short purpose clause (e.g. 'to complete this action') inserted inline.

requestWalletConnection.checkingStatus.description: Status line while the dialog checks the current wallet connection status. Includes a trailing ellipsis.

requestWalletConnection.settingAsActive.description: Status line while the chosen wallet is being set as active. Includes a trailing ellipsis.

requestWalletConnection.requiredWallet.description: Label for the wallet address the user must connect (the required wallet).

requestWalletConnection.waitingForConnec.description: Status line while waiting for the user to complete the wallet connection. Includes a trailing ellipsis.

requestWalletConnection.differentWalletC.description: Message noting the user connected a wallet other than the required one.

requestWalletConnection.youConnected.description: Label preceding the wallet address the user actually connected.

requestWalletConnection.butWeNeed.description: Label preceding the wallet address the app actually requires (contrast with what the user connected).

requestWalletConnection.connectedSuccess.description: Confirmation message that the wallet connected successfully.

requestWalletConnection.connecting.description: Busy label on the connect button while connecting. Includes a trailing ellipsis.

requestWalletConnection.next.description: Button to advance to the next step in the wallet-connection flow.

requestWalletConnection.toast.setActiveF.description: Toast error shown when setting the active wallet fails.

requestWalletConnection.toast.connectFai.description: Toast error shown when connecting the wallet fails.

requestWalletConnection.toast.unknownErr.description: Fallback toast text for an unspecified wallet error.

countryInput.placeholder.description: Placeholder for the country selector before a country is chosen; means 'Select country'.

countryInput.searchPlaceholder.description: Placeholder in the country search box. Includes a trailing ellipsis.

countryInput.noResults.description: Message shown when the country search matches no countries. Note: country names themselves are not translated here.

countryInput.clearSelection.description: Action to clear the currently selected country.

myDomains.heading.description: Page/section heading for the list of domains the signed-in user owns; means 'My Domains'.

ownerPage.heading.description: Heading on the public owner page showing all domains held by a given wallet address.

walletNftGrid.notIndexedYet.description: Badge on an NFT card indicating the domain has not been indexed yet.

walletNftGrid.emptyIdentifier.description: Empty-state prompt asking for a wallet address or ENS name to view NFTs. Keep 'ENS' (technical term) untranslated.

walletNftGrid.invalidIdentifier.description: Error shown when the entered value is not a valid wallet address or ENS name. Keep 'ENS' untranslated.

walletNftGrid.invalidIdentifierHint.description: Hint explaining valid formats: wallet must be 0x-prefixed; ENS names need a dot. Keep '0x' and 'ENS' untranslated.

walletNftGrid.ensResolveFailed.description: Error shown when an ENS name could not be resolved to an address. Keep 'ENS' untranslated.

walletNftGrid.ensResolveFailedHint.description: Hint suggesting the user re-check spelling or retry after an ENS resolution failure.

walletNftGrid.noWalletResolved.description: Error shown when no wallet could be resolved from the entered input.

walletNftGrid.nftCount.description: Pluralized NFT count using ICU plural. {count} is the number; keep the ICU syntax and the term 'NFT' intact.

walletNftGrid.loadDomainsFailed.description: Error shown when domains for the wallet could not be loaded.

walletNftGrid.loadDomainsFailedHint.description: Hint asking the user to refresh and try again after a load failure.

walletNftGrid.noNftsFound.description: Empty-state message: no Namefi NFTs found for this wallet. Keep 'Namefi' and 'NFT' untranslated.

walletNftGrid.noNftsFoundHint.description: Hint suggesting the user re-check the wallet/ENS name or wait for indexing to catch up.

walletNftGrid.unknownNetwork.description: Fallback label for a blockchain network whose name is unknown.

walletNftGrid.explorer.description: Short label for a block explorer link.

walletNftGrid.viewOnExplorer.description: Link/button to open the item on a block explorer (generic, no explorer named).

walletNftGrid.viewOn.description: Link/button to open the item on a specific block explorer. {explorer} is the explorer's name (e.g. 'Etherscan') — keep untranslated.

walletNftGrid.network.description: Field label for the blockchain network of an NFT.

walletNftGrid.expiration.description: Field label for a domain's expiration date.

walletNftGrid.wallet.description: Field label for a wallet address.

walletNftGrid.ens.description: Inline label showing a resolved ENS name. {name} is the ENS name — keep untranslated. Keep 'ENS' untranslated.

walletNftGrid.copiedToClipboard.description: Toast confirming a value was copied to the clipboard.

walletNftGrid.copyFailed.description: Toast title shown when copying to the clipboard fails.

walletNftGrid.copyFailedDescription.description: Toast body shown when copying fails, asking the user to try again.

instantBuyModal.title.description: Instant-buy modal title. {domain} is the domain name being purchased — keep untranslated.

instantBuyModal.description.description: Instant-buy modal subtitle stating the purchase covers 1 year of registration.

instantBuyModal.domain.description: Field label for the domain being purchased in the instant-buy modal.

instantBuyModal.pricePerYear.description: Per-year price line in the instant-buy modal. {price} is a formatted number; keep the 'USD' currency code and '/ year' unit.

instantBuyModal.selectNftWallet.description: Prompt to select which NFT wallet to use before continuing the purchase. Keep 'NFT' untranslated.

instantBuyModal.buyNow.description: Primary button to confirm the instant purchase.

instantBuyModal.tooltip.description: Tooltip shown on hover over the Buy Now instant-buy button, explaining the action.

instantBuyModal.errorTitle.description: Error title shown when the instant purchase fails.

instantBuyModal.errorDescription.description: Reassuring error body telling the user they were not charged and can retry.

instantBuyModal.errorDetail.description: Technical error detail line. {error} is the raw error message/code — keep untranslated.

table.searchPlaceholder.description: Default placeholder for the table's global search input; means 'Search...'. Includes a trailing ellipsis.

table.empty.description: Empty-state text shown in a table body when there are no rows; short form meaning 'No data'.

table.emptyDefault.description: Default empty-state message for a data table when no rows are returned; means 'No data found'.

table.emptyAuditLogs.description: Default empty-state message for the audit-log data table when no log entries are found.

table.loadingAuditLogs.description: Default loading message for the audit-log data table while entries load. Includes a trailing ellipsis.

table.noMoreRows.description: Label on the load-more button when there are no further rows to load.

table.showing.description: Toolbar text reporting how many rows are currently shown. {count} is the number; keep ICU plural syntax intact.

table.pagination.rowsPerPage.description: Label before the page-size selector controlling how many rows show per page; means 'Rows per page:'.

table.pagination.pageOf.description: Current page indicator. {page} is the current page number and {total} the total page count; keep both placeholders.

table.pagination.pageOfTotal.description: Pagination summary combining current page and total row count. {page}, {total} are numbers; {count} drives the ICU plural — keep all placeholders and ICU syntax.

table.pagination.totalShort.description: Compact (mobile) pagination summary showing only the total row count. {count} drives the ICU plural — keep ICU syntax intact.

table.pagination.previous.description: Button to go to the previous page of table results.

table.pagination.next.description: Button to go to the next page of table results.

table.columns.label.description: Dropdown trigger label for the column-visibility menu; means 'Columns'.

table.columns.toggle.description: Heading inside the column-visibility dropdown for toggling individual columns on/off.

table.columns.resetToDefaults.description: Action that restores the table's column layout/visibility to its default settings.

table.columns.resizeColumn.description: Accessible (aria) label for the drag handle that resizes a table column.

table.filters.label.description: Button label that opens the table's filter panel; means 'Filters'.

table.filterPanel.title.description: Title of the table filter side panel; means 'Table Filters'.

table.filterPanel.titleAdvanced.description: Title of the advanced (multi-condition) table filter side panel; means 'Advanced Filters'.

table.filterPanel.description.description: Subtitle of the table filter panel explaining its purpose.

table.filterPanel.descriptionAdvanced.description: Subtitle of the advanced filter panel. Keep 'AND/OR' (logical operators) recognizable; they may stay as-is.

table.filterPanel.activeCount.description: Badge showing how many filters are currently active. {count} is the number of active filters.

table.filterPanel.clearAll.description: Action that clears all currently applied table filters.

table.filterPanel.generalFilters.description: Section heading in the filter panel for general (non-column-specific) filters.

table.filterPanel.columnFilters.description: Section heading in the filter panel for per-column filters.

table.filterPanel.noFiltersAvailable.description: Message shown in the filter panel when the table has no configurable filters.

table.filterPanel.active.description: Badge marking an individual filter accordion item as currently active.

table.filterPanel.conditionCount.description: Badge showing how many conditions an advanced filter has. {count} is the number; keep ICU plural syntax intact.

table.filter.label.description: Generic placeholder label for an in-header column filter control; means 'Filter'.

table.filter.filterColumn.description: Heading of a column's filter popover. {column} is the column name (caller-provided) — keep the placeholder.

table.filter.filterActive.description: Screen-reader-only text announcing that a column filter is currently active.

table.filter.operator.description: Field label for selecting the comparison operator of a filter (e.g. equals, contains).

table.filter.value.description: Field label for the value to filter a column by.

table.filter.apply.description: Button that applies the entered filter.

table.filter.clear.description: Button that clears the current filter input.

table.filter.addCondition.description: Button that adds another condition to an advanced (multi-condition) filter.

table.filter.clearAllConditions.description: Button that removes all conditions from an advanced filter; means 'Clear All'.

table.filter.maxConditionsReached.description: Tooltip shown when the maximum number of filter conditions has been reached. {count} is the maximum; keep ICU plural syntax intact.

table.filter.selectPlaceholder.description: Placeholder for a select-type filter dropdown before a value is chosen; means 'Select...'.

table.filter.selectDatePlaceholder.description: Placeholder for a date filter input before a date is chosen. Includes a trailing ellipsis.

table.filter.enterValuePlaceholder.description: Generic placeholder for a free-text filter value input; means 'Enter value...'.

table.filter.typeValuePlaceholder.description: Placeholder for the combobox search input where a user types a filter value. Includes a trailing ellipsis.

table.filter.enterFieldPlaceholder.description: Placeholder prompting input for a specific field's filter value. {field} is the lowercased field name (caller-provided) — keep the placeholder.

table.filter.noSuggestions.description: Message in a filter combobox when no suggestions match, noting the typed value can still be used.

table.filter.suggestions.description: Heading above the list of suggested filter values in a combobox.

table.filter.invalidNumber.description: Toast error shown when a numeric filter value is not a valid number.

table.filter.invalidDate.description: Toast error shown when a date filter value is not a valid date.

table.filter.operators.contains.description: Filter operator: the cell value contains the entered text.

table.filter.operators.containsCaseInsen.description: Filter operator: contains the entered text, ignoring letter case.

table.filter.operators.equals.description: Filter operator: the cell value equals the entered value.

table.filter.operators.notEquals.description: Filter operator: the cell value does not equal the entered value.

table.filter.operators.greaterThan.description: Filter operator: the cell value is greater than the entered value.

table.filter.operators.greaterOrEqual.description: Filter operator: the cell value is greater than or equal to the entered value.

table.filter.operators.lessThan.description: Filter operator: the cell value is less than the entered value.

table.filter.operators.lessOrEqual.description: Filter operator: the cell value is less than or equal to the entered value.

table.filter.operators.after.description: Date filter operator: the date is after the entered date.

table.filter.operators.onOrAfter.description: Date filter operator: the date is on or after the entered date.

table.filter.operators.before.description: Date filter operator: the date is before the entered date.

table.filter.operators.onOrBefore.description: Date filter operator: the date is on or before the entered date.

table.filter.operators.isNull.description: Filter operator: the cell value is empty/null.

table.filter.operators.isNotNull.description: Filter operator: the cell value is not empty/null.

table.filter.operators.inList.description: Filter operator: the cell value is one of a list of values.

table.filter.operators.notInList.description: Filter operator: the cell value is not in a list of values.

table.filter.operators.allElementsEquals.description: Array filter operator: every element of the array equals the value. 'Elements' may be swapped for a caller-provided element name in English only.

table.filter.operators.allElementsNotEqu.description: Array filter operator: every element of the array does not equal the value.

table.filter.operators.anyElementEquals.description: Array filter operator: at least one element of the array equals the value.

table.filter.operators.anyElementNotEqua.description: Array filter operator: at least one element of the array does not equal the value.

table.filter.operators.allElementsContai.description: Array filter operator: every element of the array contains the text.

table.filter.operators.allElementsNotCon.description: Array filter operator: every element of the array does not contain the text.

table.filter.operators.anyElementContain.description: Array filter operator: at least one element of the array contains the text.

table.filter.operators.anyElementNotCont.description: Array filter operator: at least one element of the array does not contain the text.

signInChooser.walletButton.description: Button in the sign-in chooser that opens the crypto-wallet connect modal (Reown AppKit).

signInChooser.googleButton.description: One-tap Google sign-in button in the sign-in chooser (Privy Google login).
